race.comment: Tricky contest with plenty of chances. SKYCATCHER (1) lightly raced gelding who resumes with a good winning record. Jumped in trip and class when nailed late to finish third over 1600m at Werribee last December. Can take the next step this campaign judging by the two good trials. BOTANIST (2) Wootton Bassett colt who resumes after showing a stack of ability in his first preparation. Given the two soft trials and can hold a forward position with Grima's 2kg claim. FIERCENESS (6) bounced off his eye-catching first-up third at Mudgee with a well-deserved Maiden win over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Can go on with now in this harder race with map favours. TOOMUCHINFORMATION (8) racing in career best form in weaker company and can surprise again at the each-way price. Gave them a galloping lesson when leading throughout over 1262m at Taree in BM58 class. Down sharply in weight and worth thought. The chances don't end there.
